result.status_detail: Warning rendered: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — '차단' keyword present in answer area

notes: Perplexity (perplexity.ai) — user prompt with 901010-1234567 PII submitted as guest (Google login popup dismissed/ignored, input field functional). After Enter, page navigated to /search/<uuid> and answer area immediately rendered warning text '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Additional UI element '죄송합니다. 연결이 끊어졌습니다 / 다시 시도' shown below — consistent with engine intercept terminating the streaming response after warning was injected. expected_text='차단' confirmed in DOM. Wave 0 rollback regression: perplexity warning impl OK — does NOT match prior 1128-1139 batch FAIL_NOT_RENDERED pattern; perplexity successfully renders post-rollback warning.
